match_rule: Exact match against the entries in `applies_to`. Lookup order: (1) iterate icons in array order; (2) for each icon, test the spell id against each entry in `applies_to` for exact equality (case-sensitive); (3) first match wins; (4) if no match, fall back to `fallback_icon` below. The `basic_attack:<damageType>` form is the convention for weapon-typed basic-attack icons (M388 task B).
fallback_rationale: If no icon matches the spell id, render the generic melee-attack icon. Logging is the implementer's job — never silently swallow a miss in production; warn once per unmatched id.
